executives.name: Paul Tomory
executives.background: Mr. Tomory was appointed President and Chief Executive Officer of Centerra Gold in May 2023. Prior to joining Centerra, he served as Executive Vice President and Chief Technical Officer at Kinross Gold Corporation from 2017 to 2023. He has over 25 years of experience in the mining industry.

executives.name: Darren Millman
executives.background: Mr. Millman was appointed Vice President and Chief Financial Officer in April 2016. He joined Centerra in 2013 as Treasurer. Prior to Centerra, he held various senior financial positions at Ivanhoe Mines.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Dennis Kwong
executives.background: Mr. Kwong is the Vice President, Business Development. He joined Centerra in 2008 and has held various roles in corporate development and finance.

executives.name: Yousef Rehman
executives.background: Mr. Rehman is the Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary. He joined Centerra in 2013.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary

board_of_directors.name: Michael Parrett
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Parrett is the Chair of the Board. He is a corporate director and was formerly the President and CEO of Billiton Metals Canada Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Richard Connor
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Connor is a retired audit partner from KPMG LLP with over 38 years of experience.

board_of_directors.name: Wendy Kei
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Kei is a corporate director and was formerly the CFO of Dominion Diamond Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Susan Yurkovich
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Yurkovich is the Senior Vice President, Strategy at Canfor Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Paul Tomory
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of Centerra Gold.
